case_title: JOSE MOLINA MOLINA VS. MARTINEZ CONSTRUCTION, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOLINA, JOSE LUIS AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ CONSTRUCTION, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP MARTINEZ, JUAN CARLOS AS INDIVIDUALS AND  PARTNERS DBA MARTINEZ CONSTRUCTION, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP PARVIN SEDIGH FARASATI, BOTH AS INDIVIDUALS AND PARTNERS DBA MARTINEZ CONSTRUCTION, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOLINA, JOSE LUIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ CONSTRUCTION, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP MARTINEZ, JUAN CARLOS AS INDIVIDUALS AND  PARTNERS DBA MARTINEZ CONSTRUCTION, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP PARVIN SEDIGH FARASATI, BOTH AS INDIVIDUALS AND PARTNERS DBA MARTINEZ CONSTRUCTION, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP $14,553.17 PRINCIPAL, $33.90 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,957.07, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
